task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct FOIA case in ArkCase
task_completion.visual_evidence: ArkCase interface showing the case title 'FOIA-2024-00847 - Public Records Request for Environmental Inspection Reports'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first cost entry was added to the case
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cost entry or expense record in ArkCase showing the description 'Document search and retrieval - 4.5 hours', an amount of $450.00, and the date 2025-01-15.

task_completion.description: Verify the second cost entry was added to the case
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cost entry or expense record in ArkCase showing the description 'Legal review of responsive documents - 12.5 hours', an amount of $1250.00, and the date 2025-01-22.

task_completion.description: Verify the third cost entry was added to the case
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cost entry or expense record in ArkCase showing the description 'Redaction and duplication processing', an amount of $325.00, and the date 2025-01-28.

task_completion.description: Verify the summary report text file was created at the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file manager, or terminal showing a file named 'cost_tracking_report.txt' located in the '~/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the summary report contains the case ID and all three cost entry descriptions and amounts
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'cost_tracking_report.txt' displaying the case ID (FOIA-2024-00847) and the three specific entries with their respective amounts ($450.00, $1250.00, $325.00).

task_completion.description: Verify the summary report contains the correct total processing cost
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'cost_tracking_report.txt' displaying a total processing cost of $2025.00.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the ArkCase web/GUI interface to add the costs
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the actual ArkCase application interface, forms, or cost tracking modules being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the text file was actually created and saved
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the saved file 'cost_tracking_report.txt' or a terminal command like 'cat' outputting the file contents from the Documents folder, not just text typed into an unsaved prompt.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with ArkCase before creating the report
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of ArkCase interaction screenshots prior to the creation of the text file, proving the agent didn't just write a script to echo the final text without doing the ArkCase data entry.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected total processing cost to be calculated and included in the summary report is exactly $2025.00 (the mathematical sum of $450.00, $1250.00, and $325.00). The case ID is FOIA-2024-00847.
